posts.author: Tough_Nut
posts.text: IRR calculation on the recycled yarn plant is quite underwhelming

posts.author: Aarti
posts.text: As per revised guidance given by management, Q1 revenues have improved in June and so revenues and profits will be lower.. as per my estimates Revenue in Q1 FY27, should be 930 cr (1,049cr in Q1 FY26) at 6% EBITDA margin (as per management guidance) and profits should be 30cr (41cr in Q1 FY26) - reduction of 25%. Long term prospects are good due to Recycling plant. But there is risk of falling crude prices. If crude prices fall by 20% both prices of virgin and recycled fibre will fall 20% reducing the margin in recycled fibre a lot - as conversion/ recovery cost from waste to fibre will remain…
